elements.label: Description
elements.value: First merge-only tier. Cannot spawn directly. Merges into Pear.

onChange.template:
[Gameplan: update .gameplan/mergeladder/properties/apple.schema.json, set ct_apple_radius to {{ct_apple_radius}}]
Set Apple radius to {{ct_apple_radius}} pixels.

[Gameplan: update .gameplan/mergeladder/properties/apple.schema.json, set ct_apple_score to {{ct_apple_score}}]
Set Apple merge score to {{ct_apple_score}} points.
